Package org.rodinp.core

Class RodinMarkerUtil

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.RodinMarkerUtil
public final class RodinMarkerUtil extends Object
Utility class for manipulating markers used by the Rodin database.

TODO add description of Rodin markers: their attributes and their meaning

Since:
1.0

  • Field Details

    • RODIN_PROBLEM_MARKER

      public static final String RODIN_PROBLEM_MARKER
      Rodin database problem marker type (value "org.rodinp.core.problem"). This can be used to recognize those markers in the workspace that flag problems detected by Rodin tools.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ERROR_CODE

      public static final String ERROR_CODE
      Error code marker attribute (value "code"). This attribute contains the internal error code of the problem, so that clients do not have to parse the localized error message associated to a problem. The error code must be unique (i.e., prefixed with the contributing plug-in identifier).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ARGUMENTS

      public static final String ARGUMENTS
      Arguments marker attribute (value "arguments"). This attribute contains the arguments to the problem.

      Arguments are concatenated into one String, each being prefixed with its length (in decimal form followed with a colon). For example:

      • { "foo", "cafe" } is encoded as "3:foo4:cafe",
      • { } is encoded as "".

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ELEMENT

      public static final String ELEMENT
      Element marker attribute (value "element"). This attribute contains the handle identifier of the Rodin internal element where the problem is located.

      This attribute is optional, however it must be set if ATTRIBUTE_ID is specified.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ATTRIBUTE_ID

      public static final String ATTRIBUTE_ID
      Attribute id marker attribute (value "attributeId"). This attribute contains the identifier of the Rodin attribute where the problem is located.

      This marker attribute is optional, however it must be set if either CHAR_START or CHAR_END is specified.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CHAR_START

      public static final String CHAR_START
      Character start marker attribute (value "charStart").

      An integer value indicating where a text marker starts. This attribute is zero-relative and inclusive. The position stored in this attribute is relative to the String representation of the Rodin attribute where the error is located (see ATTRIBUTE_ID). That latter attribute must thus be of kind String.

      This attribute is optional, however it must be set if CHAR_END is set. Moreover, its value must be strictly less than that of CHAR_END.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CHAR_END

      public static final String CHAR_END
      Character end marker attribute (value "charEnd").

      An integer value indicating where a text marker ends. This attribute is zero-relative and exclusive. The position stored in this attribute is relative to the String representation of the Rodin attribute where the error is located (see ATTRIBUTE_ID). That latter attribute must thus be of kind String.

      This attribute is optional, however it must be set if CHAR_START is set. Moreover, its value must be strictly greater than that of CHAR_START.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BUILDPATH_PROBLEM_MARKER

      public static final String BUILDPATH_PROBLEM_MARKER
      Build problem marker type (value "org.rodinp.core.buildProblem"). This can be used to recognize those markers in the workspace that flag problems detected by the Rodin builder while computing the dependency graph.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CYCLE_DETECTED

      public static final String CYCLE_DETECTED
      Cycle detected marker attribute (value "cycleDetected"). Used only on build problem markers. The value of this attribute is either true or false.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • RodinMarkerUtil

      public RodinMarkerUtil()

  • Method Details

    • getErrorCode

      public static String getErrorCode(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the error code of the given marker. Returns null if the marker does not exist or does not carry an error code.
      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the error code of the given marker or null in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • ERROR_CODE

    • getArguments

      public static String[] getArguments(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the arguments of the given marker. Returns null if the marker does not exist, does not carry an arguments attribute or the attribute value is ill-formed. If the marker has no argument, an empty array is returned.
      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the arguments of the given marker or null in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • ARGUMENTS

    • getElement

      public static IRodinElement getElement(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the smallest element marked by the given marker. Returns null if the marker does not exist or does not relate to a Rodin element.

      If the given marker carries an internal element, this internal element is returned. Otherwise, if the resource to which this marked is attached corresponds to a Rodin element, this element is returned. Otherwise, null is returned.

      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the smallest element corresponding to the given marker or null if there is no corresponding Rodin element
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • ELEMENT

    • getInternalElement

      public static IInternalElement getInternalElement(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the internal element of the given marker. Returns null if the marker does not exist or does not carry an internal element.
      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the internal element of the given marker or null in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • ELEMENT

    • getAttributeType

      public static IAttributeType getAttributeType(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the attribute type of the given marker. Returns null if the marker does not exist or does not carry an attribute type.
      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the attribute type of the given marker or null in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • ATTRIBUTE_ID

    • getCharStart

      public static int getCharStart(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the start position of the given marker. Returns -1 if the marker does not exist or does not carry a start position.
      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the start position of the given marker or -1 in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • CHAR_START

    • getCharEnd

      public static int getCharEnd(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarker marker)
      Returns the end position of the given marker. Returns -1 if the marker does not exist or does not carry an end position.
      Parameters:
      marker - marker to read
      Returns:
      the end position of the given marker or -1 in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • CHAR_START

    • getElement

      public static IRodinElement getElement(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarkerDelta delta)
      Returns the smallest element marked by the given marker delta. Returns null if the marker delta does not relate to a Rodin element.

      If the given marker delta carries an internal element, this internal element is returned. Otherwise, if the resource to which this marker delta is attached corresponds to a Rodin element, this element is returned. Otherwise, null is returned.

      Parameters:
      delta - marker delta to read
      Returns:
      the smallest element corresponding to the given marker delta or null if there is no corresponding Rodin element
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker delta
      See Also:
      • ELEMENT
      • getElement(IMarker)

    • getInternalElement

      public static IInternalElement getInternalElement(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarkerDelta delta)
      Returns the internal element of the given marker. Returns null if the marker does not exist or does not carry an internal element.
      Parameters:
      delta - marker to read
      Returns:
      the internal element of the given marker or null in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker is not a Rodin problem marker
      See Also:
      • ELEMENT
      • getInternalElement(IMarker)

    • getAttributeType

      public static IAttributeType getAttributeType(org.eclipse.core.resources.IMarkerDelta delta)
      Returns the attribute type of the given marker delta. Returns null if the marker delta does not carry an attribute type.
      Parameters:
      delta - marker delta to read
      Returns:
      the attribute type of the given marker delta or null in case of error
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given marker delta is not a Rodin problem marker delta
      See Also:
      • ATTRIBUTE_ID
      • getAttributeType(IMarker)
